title: Roles & permissions
description: Define what each type of user can do on the platform. System roles are protected and cannot be modified.

demo_locked.description: Demo clinic: you can view roles, but cannot create or change permissions (that would affect other clinics).

row.system_locked: This role is part of the system and cannot be modified.

empty.no_records_description: Create your first role to assign specific permissions to a group of users.
empty.no_results_description: No role matches the current filters. Try adjusting the search or changing the type.

form.description_create: Define the name of the new role.
form.description_edit: Update the name and description of the role.
form.section_basic_hint_create: Identify the role with a short lowercase name and a description explaining its purpose. You'll be able to assign permissions from the row action menu afterwards.
form.section_basic_hint_edit: Edit visible role data. Permissions are managed from this row's action menu.
form.permissions_hint_edit: To assign or remove permissions, open this role's action menu and choose "Manage permissions".

fields.name: Name
fields.name_hint: Use lowercase, numbers and underscores. It is the internal identifier.
fields.description_placeholder: Briefly explain what this role does

permissions_modal.title: Manage permissions
permissions_modal.description: Tick the permissions this role is allowed to use.
permissions_modal.system_banner_title: You are editing a system role
permissions_modal.system_banner_body: Editing superadmin permissions can lock the platform owner out of critical areas. Removing permissions like roles.update or sedes.view is only recommended for controlled tests. To restore the original set run: php artisan db:seed --class=SuperadminSeeder.
permissions_modal.system_confirm: You are about to modify the permissions of system role "{{role}}". If you remove essential permissions you might lose access to parts of the app. Continue?

delete.title: Delete role
delete.description: You're about to delete role {{name}}. Users assigned to this role will lose it immediately. This action cannot be undone.
delete.system_blocked: This role belongs to the system and cannot be deleted.

bulk.delete_description: You're about to delete {{count}} selected roles. Users assigned to these roles will lose them immediately. System roles will be skipped.
